entities.description: m31 resetn pu 1v8 is a reset signal used as a baseboard peripheral reset signal  which may be affected by power off sleep states of the peripheral
m31 resetn pu 3v3 is a reset input signal that requires buffering to isolate it from the effects of the m31 resetn pu 1v8 reset signal

relations.description: the m31 resetn pu 3v3 reset input signal needs buffering to isolate it from the m31 resetn pu 1v8 reset signal  which could cause system reset if not handled properly
